scripts.dev: npm run build -w client && npm run dev -w server
scripts.dev:lan: npm run build -w client && npm run dev -w server -- --host
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build -w client && npm --prefix desktop run dev
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build -w client && npm --prefix desktop run dist
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run build -w client && npm --prefix desktop run dist:win
